home.subtitle: Cinematic Analog Film Emulation
home.description: Capture professional cinematic photos with a custom C++/Kotlin native rendering engine for real-time analog film look.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to Grovkornet. Transparency and the protection of your privacy are fundamental to us. Below we provide information on how this website works in relation to the processing of personal data.

section1.title: 1. Data Controller
section1.content:
The Data Controller is:
Alex Giustizieri
Contact email: alexgiustizieri@gmail.com

section2.title: 2. Absence of Personal Data Collection
section2.content: This website is an informational presentation page ("Coming Soon"). It does not collect, request, or process in any way the personal data of users. There are no registration forms, text fields for data entry, or newsletters.

section3.title: 3. Cookies and Tracking Systems
section3.content: This site does not use profiling cookies, advertising cookies, or other tracking systems for user activity. Any technical session cookies are used exclusively to ensure the correct loading and technical functioning of the page.

section4.title: 4. Links to Third-Party Sites and Services
section4.content: The site may contain links to external platforms (such as official Stores for downloading applications). By clicking on these links, you will be redirected to external services that adopt their own privacy policies, independent of this page. We invite you to consult the respective policies on the destination sites.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: Since we do not collect or store any personal data through this site, there are no personal data archives on which you can exercise the rights of modification, access, or deletion under the GDPR. For any questions or clarifications on the technical functioning of the page, you can contact us at the email address indicated in point 1.
